scoreboard.label: Agent hoạt động
scoreboard.subtext: Coach, Lebron, Bronny, Curry, tuvi-agent, laoshi-agent

agents.name: Coach
agents.role: PM / UI Designer / Researcher / Release gatekeeper of Dream Team. You define what gets built, how it looks and feels, why it matters, and when it's done. You do not implement code.
agents.description: Dream Team PM / scope / release gate
agents.current: tu-vi 7-day mastery plan structured; Day 1 auto-triggers Mar 25

agents.name: Lebron
agents.role: Backend engineer of Dream Team. You turn specs into working, tested backend code. You do not design, you do not gate releases.
agents.current: tu-vi: 12 commits — probe pipeline, `--go` cron mode, `/ask` compat fix, release docs

agents.name: Bronny
agents.role: Frontend engineer of Dream Team. You turn design specs into pixel-accurate, accessible, responsive interfaces. You do not design, you do not gate releases.
agents.current: pkm-auction: heaviest FE week — draft-save 422 workaround, 200+ component files, dual-app (web-app vs web-v2)

agents.name: Curry
agents.role: QA engineer of Dream Team. You validate against frozen specs. You classify issues. You determine ship readiness. You do not code, you do not design.
agents.current: tu-vi: M1 gate passed 3/22, accessibility fixes verified, `/ask` compat added

agents.name: tuvi-agent
agents.role: Tử vi domain specialist. You handle the entire Tử Vi Nam Phái (Lê Quang Lăng) project: transcript management, knowledge base, retrieval, and doctrine-grounded Q&A. You do not do general-purpose work.
agents.current: 20 new transcripts ingested (460→479), not yet reviewed into KB

agents.name: laoshi-agent
agents.role: Private Mandarin teacher for one learner on a dedicated Telegram bot.
agents.current: 7-day tu-vi mastery cron automation set (deleteAfterRun: true)

agents.name: MiniSama
agents.role: CEO / Orchestrator of Dream Team. You coordinate, you do not implement.

Scope issues: Audit identified 9 priority fixes but none applied yet — gap between analysis and action
Handoff quality: Good identification of cross-agent sync gaps (escalation, integration testing, quick-fix threshold)
Lebron: Code quality signals: Identity verified — correctly references API contract rules, quick-fix threshold, error convention
Bronny: UI/UX quality: Identity verified — correctly references WCAG AA, design handoff checklist, a11y standards
Curry: Validations run: Identity verified — correctly references 8 issue classification categories, ship recommendation format
Issues found: N/A — but Coach's audit identified Curry needs: escalation protocol, automation stance, re-test protocol, engagement criteria

feedback.text: Tasks managed: Cross-agent SOUL/AGENT audit (comprehensive), identity verification rounds, 8-fix acknowledgment

feedback.text: cardmasters zero QA since init; must test before deploy
pkm-auction CreateMarketDto backend bug forcing FE workaround

lessons.text: Tiny task card giúp giảm loạn scope.
Scope phải freeze trước khi coding.
Curry nên test theo contract cố định, không test theo target đang đổi.
Retrieval tuning cần golden query set sớm.
Artifact-first handoff tốt hơn full-history forwarding.
Phase 1 phù hợp với Dream Team nếu triển khai như runtime guardrail vô hình.
Tool-output compaction hợp với Dream Team vì giảm noise/context bloat.
Artifact storage chỉ nên là phụ trợ tự động, không biến thành thủ tục.
Chunk budgets hợp nếu để rộng tay và checkpoint thưa.
Hai failure mode cần nhớ cho long-run: context truncation/compaction và runtime timeout.
